name: Chocolate Coconut Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt chocolate over low heat in a saucepan.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the milk, coconut, and walnuts until combined.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Place in the oven and turn off the heat.
6. Leave for about 15 minutes or until the candy has a glazed appearance.
7. Remove from the cookie sheet while still warm.
